prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: A Vault login flow begins failing after an auth backend change. Find the Go source files in hashicorp/vault that (1) dispatch login requests to auth backends, (2) validate the auth method response and token creation path, and (3) propagate authentication failures to the API caller or audit logs.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the hashicorp-vault fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: A Vault login flow begins failing after an auth backend change. Find the Go source files in hashicorp/vault that (1) dispatch login requests to auth backends, (2) validate the auth method response and token creation path, and (3) propagate authentication failures to the API caller or audit logs.

params.search_pattern: auth backend OR login OR token OR authenticate
